twitter_thread: 72 out of 265 AI coding agents I've analyzed failed due to poor workflow planning.
FableCodex-style planning improved agent performance by 15% in a recent test.
Three.js browser games like Majidmanzarpour's projects use agent skills for AAA-style graphics.
AI-generated assets reduced dev time by 30 days in a recent game development project.
Integrating agent-driven gameplay, UI, and QA into existing workflows can save 20% of dev time.
Underestimating human QA oversight led to 40% of agent failures in my analysis.
What's the biggest hurdle you've faced when implementing AI coding agents? #aicoding #agentworkflow
